themes.reasoning_notes: Has an activated self-sacrifice ability, making it a modest sacrifice enabler tied to board presence.
Can sacrifice itself to deal 2 to any target, functioning as small-scale creature removal or reach.
Its only themed text is a self-sacrifice activated ability that deals 2 damage to any target, reading more like modest burn/reach than a sacrifice-matters card.
The 2-damage shot can pick off small creatures, but the rate is low and not a dedicated removal piece.
It does sacrifice itself as a cost, but that is incidental to the damage ability rather than real sacrifice-deck support.
